title: Dimensional Rift — Expanding
description: Reality tear detected in Old Sokovia city center. Rift expanding at 0.3m/min. Batman containing. Immediate backup may be required.

title: Eastern Mine — Hostile Incursion
description: Armed hostiles breached vibranium mine perimeter. Hulk responding. 4 contacts, 2 neutralized.

title: Unauthorized Drone Activity
description: Two reconnaissance drones intercepted at northern perimeter. Origin unknown. Analyzing wreckage for tech signatures.

title: Minor Dimensional Breach Sealed
description: Incursion point from dimension 616-B detected and sealed by Spiderman. Monitoring for recurrence.

title: Supply Drop Completed
description: Emergency medical and munitions resupply delivered to Wakanda via Quinjet. ETA confirmed.
